name: Nihon Jyoho Create Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nihon Jyoho Create Co., Ltd. engages in developing and providing IT solutions for the real estate industry in Japan. Its products and services include inter-company property distribution service that supports property information sharing and property purchasing to other companies; brokerage support service that supports brokerage works, such as advertisement placement, attracting customers, adding customers, applying for residence, IT critical theory, and electronic contract; management work support service, which supports rental management operations comprising contract conclusion/entrance/exit management, rent payment management, owner remittance, and building repair management; and consumer support service that supports operations, such as contacting tenants and reporting to the owner. Nihon Jyoho Create Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Miyakonojo, Japan.
